data.title: My Notion Pipeline
data.name: My Notion Pipeline
data.subtitle: Notion-powered project operations and portfolio automation
data.summary:
An automated project and portfolio workflow that uses Notion as the central source of truth for capturing, organizing, maintaining, and publishing work across its full lifecycle. What began as a folder-based system built on local files and .project.json evolved into a relational Notion workspace that connects project metadata, work logs, tasks, milestones, media, and documentation in one structured environment.


Inside Notion, the system uses formulas, required-action logic, severity scoring, and visual workflow signals to make project readiness measurable and easier to manage. That structure reduces duplicate entry, improves documentation quality, and keeps projects consistently maintained as they move from idea to execution to presentation.


When project data reaches the right state, n8n detects qualifying changes and assembles portfolio-ready JSON, which is then sent into a Python-based build pipeline that prepares content and media for a static portfolio site. Linear supports issue tracking, GitHub stores code and optimized assets, and Firebase Hosting serves the finished site.


The result is a connected operating system for project operations and portfolio publishing: one that keeps documentation, execution, and presentation aligned with the real state of the work over time.
data.oneLiner: A Notion-centered project operating system that turns structured project data into an always-up-to-date portfolio.

workLogs.title: Designing the Notion–n8n Workflow System
workLogs.whatHappened: I set up n8n automations connected to my Notion databases and created several templates in Notion for tasks and projects. A significant amount of time went into designing and organizing how data flows between the systems so the workflows remain structured, consistent, and easy to automate.
workLogs.problems: Found myself a little too distracted updating colors and icons when I should’ve been saving that for the very end
workLogs.nextStep: Create the basic Project template for each domain, the different types of notes templates as well as the log templates.

workLogs.title: Created full automation and ingest system with project addition in Notion and n8n
workLogs.entry: Created full automation and ingest system with project addition in Notion and n8n
workLogs.whatHappened: I created a full automation and ingestion system that connects project additions in Notion with workflows in n8n. When a new project is added, the system automatically captures and processes the data through n8n, organizing it and preparing it for downstream workflows and documentation. This establishes a structured pipeline for consistently ingesting and managing new project information.

workLogs.title: Building n8n Automations and a Notion Dashboard
workLogs.entry: Building n8n Automations and a Notion Dashboard
workLogs.whatHappened: I created the full set of n8n automations and integrated them with my workspace. I also added a dashboard in Notion to monitor and manage the workflows, giving a centralized view of automation activity and project data.

workLogs.title: Created automation for tasks and subtasks using n8n
workLogs.entry: Created automation for tasks and subtasks using n8n
workLogs.whatHappened: Created a workflow that checks for updates to notion’s Tasks db then syncs the data for accompanying tasks subtasks, project, milestone as well as adds a note to say what happened.
workLogs.problems: Workflow on n8n takes longer than expected to set up and logically workthrough
workLogs.nextStep: - Add workflows for task status change → work log update

workLogs.entry: Implemented full automation with n8n, Notion and linear

workLogs.title: Created full work flow for Notion tasks, projects and milestones
workLogs.entry: Created full work flow for Notion tasks, projects and milestones
workLogs.whatHappened: Added formula columns to the milestones, projects, tasks and assets db, and the work log db, so that required actions to complete the db entry are sorted and conditionally colored.
workLogs.nextStep: Take all the projects from existing portfolio and add them into the Projects db.
